content:
I need to multiply 487 × 7aa in base 11.

First, let me convert to base 10 to calculate, then convert back.

487 (base 11) = 4×11² + 8×11¹ + 7×11⁰ = 4×121 + 8×11 + 7×1 = 484 + 88 + 7 = 579 (base 10)

7aa (base 11) = 7×11² + 10×11¹ + 10×11⁰ = 7×121 + 10×11 + 10×1 = 847 + 110 + 10 = 967 (base 10)

579 × 967 = 559,893 (base 10)

Now convert 559,893 to base 11:
559,893 ÷ 11 = 50,899 remainder 4
50,899 ÷ 11 = 4,627 remainder 2
4,627 ÷ 11 = 420 remainder 7
420 ÷ 11 = 38 remainder 2
38 ÷ 11 = 3 remainder 5
3 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 3

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 352724

352724
